title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, published to npm as 'ollama'.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, available on PyPI.

title: langchain-community/llms Ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat model.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) with multi-user support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama, published to Maven Central.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama API.

title: ollama-cli-copilot
summary: Terminal copilot that pipes shell questions to your local Ollama model.

title: ollama-copilot.nvim
summary: Neovim plugin bringing local Ollama completions inline like GitHub Copilot.

title: ollama-vscode
summary: VS Code extension to chat with local Ollama models inside the editor.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for deploying, fine-tuning, and integrating Ollama models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to run Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Collection of Docker Compose files bundling Ollama with WebUI, NGINX, and monitoring.

title: ollama-model-registry
summary: Official curated list of modelfiles (Llama 3, Phi-3, Mistral, etc.) maintained by Ollama.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Lightweight Discord bot that answers questions using a local Ollama backend.

title: ollama-telegram-bot
summary: Telegram bot server that forwards messages to Ollama and streams replies.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app template that connects to Ollama for local LLM conversations.

title: ollama-nest
summary: Experimental NestJS module providing injectable Ollama services for TypeScript backends.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package for integrating Ollama into cross-platform mobile/desktop apps.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate offering strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.
